content.en:
As the only one who rebels against the heavens of the Protoss, the importance of Allah is self-evident, and he naturally has some life-defying treasures given by the Protoss.

I saw that Allah the Immortal took out a palm-sized statue and immediately moved this statue.

Suddenly, the statue released a light that instantly enveloped Ye Tian.

At this time, Ye Tian's attack also descended and slashed at the statue.

Boom!

A shattered statue fell from the sky, but the figure of Allah disappeared.

"Escaped!"

Ye Tian frowned, a little disappointed.

Since his cultivation, there are almost only a handful of people who can escape from him, I thought that I could kill Allah, but I didn't expect that Allah would have such a strange treasure and fled in an instant.

"Hmph, I'll meet you again, next time I see you, I'll kill you!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly.

......

This world, somewhere.

The figure of Allah the Immortal appeared, and his face showed a little horror, and he immediately calmed down.

"Whew, finally escaped. This time, if it weren't for the stand-in statue given by the First Divine Master, I guess it would be difficult for me to escape! It would be really too difficult to escape from a Chaos Dao cultivator!"

Allah the Immortal muttered.

Immediately, he made out his bearings, and his eyes looked somewhere.

"The First Divine Lord has said that it is highly likely that this world was not born naturally, but was created by a transcendent being. The detached one has some dwellings in this world, and there are some chances in these dwellings, but not very important ones. The real chance of this world is the inheritance left by the transcendent, and the first god lord was lucky enough to find the inheritance and obtained a fighting method, which led to the position of the first god master. The First Divine Lord hopes that I can also obtain the inheritance and increase my combat power, so as to survive the Cosmic God Thunder Tribulation!"

Allah is immortal.

It's hard to find a place to inherit, it's a place that can change at any time.

Once, the First Divine Lord asked the people of the Protoss to follow his instructions to search, but the place where there was a place of inheritance could no longer be found, and then the people of the Protoss found the land of inheritance in other places, and the location was different for the two times.

Therefore, the place of inheritance is not fixed.

In other words, the place of inheritance is fixed, but the entrance is not.

Only by finding the entrance to the Land of Inheritance can you enter the Land of Inheritance.

Overall, entrances have only one thing in common, and that's architecture!

Earlier, the Protoss summoned him that a manor had appeared, and he suspected that it was the entrance, so he passed.

Unexpectedly, he encountered Ye Tian and almost fell there.

"The True Monarch of Ten Thousand Laws has not entered the land of inheritance, presumably that manor is not the entrance, continue to find other buildings. If I find it and have obtained an amazing inheritance, my combat power may be able to surpass the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch and kill him directly when the time comes!" thought Allah.

Little by little, time passed.

In the blink of an eye, months have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian received the news of a certain galaxy-level peak powerhouse.

Before coming in, the Terran Supremes had asked Ye Tian and the others to leave a way to communicate with each other, so that they could take care of each other in this world.

But in reality, even if you are in danger, it is useless to try to summon someone else.

After all, everyone is far away from each other, and the battle is imminent, basically it ends quickly, and it is too late to ask for help.

Therefore, Ye Tian had not received any requests for help from others before this.

Now, the message he received was not a subpoena for help, but a notice.

"Discover a stone tower with a legacy inside, come quickly!"

This should be a mass messaging.

"Legacy!"

Ye Tian's heart was moved, and through the news of the transmission of this celebrity-level galaxy-level peak powerhouse, he determined the location mentioned above, and immediately went to that position.

Swish!

Ye Tian moved forward quickly, and it took some time to finally arrive at this position.

......

There was no one in front of the stone tower, and they all obviously entered the stone tower.

Outside the stone tower, there was a battle, and some fragments of corpses remained here.

And Ye Tian also found the corpses of several human race galaxy-level peak powerhouses and the corpse of a galaxy-level peak powerhouse, and there were also many corpses of other races.

Ye Tian did not hesitate and immediately entered the stone tower.

As soon as he entered the stone tower, Ye Tian was transferred to another place.

Rumble!!!

Heaven and earth are transformed.

Ye Tian found himself in a space.

The space was silent, there was nothing.

Suddenly.

A warrior with a gun appeared in front of Ye Tian and instantly attacked towards Ye Tian.

Ye Tian raised his hand and slapped it with a palm, directly smashing this warrior to pieces.

Soon, a flame warrior appeared, but it was still easily killed by Ye Tian.

A venerable warrior appeared one after another, although they were all different warriors, and their combat effectiveness was getting stronger and stronger, but they were still not Ye Tian's opponents.

After slaying ten warriors, a suction force came.

In an instant, Ye Tian was sucked into another place.

At this moment, a voice came.

"The inheritance assessment is coming, please choose the assessment method!"

"Easy assessment or difficult assessment, choose one of the two!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian understood.

Those soldiers just now were not real assessments at all, they could only be regarded as screenings.

If you don't kill those warriors, there may be some rewards, but they are definitely not valuable rewards.

Really good things can only be obtained through the inheritance assessment, and the two options of simple assessment and difficult assessment are also set up for the examiner.

If the strength of the assessor is not strong, you should choose the simple assessment, if you are talented, you can choose the difficult assessment.

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly chose the difficult assessment.

As one of the anti-heaven and the son of the top era, Ye Tian naturally would not choose a simple assessment, otherwise he would be too unconfident.

The rewards of the simple assessment and the difficult assessment are definitely not the same level, and Ye Tian doesn't want to just get ordinary treasures or ordinary inheritances.

"The inheritance here may be left by the transcendent, I must pass the difficult assessment in order to get more and more precious opportunities, so that I will not come to this trip in vain!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"I choose the difficult assessment!"

Ye Tian said.

"The examiner is successfully selected, the difficult assessment is coming, please prepare the examiner!"

The mechanical voice rang out again.
